name: Crenshaw Mafia Gang
description: Crenshaw Mafia Gang are a predominately African-American street gang located in the City of Inglewood in Los Angeles County. The original founders started this gang as a spin-off of the Inglewood Family Gang in 1981. Their turf is located on the westside of Crenshaw Blvd off Century in a neighborhood called “The Bottoms,” and 104th Street is their core location.

sources.title: Crenshaw Mafia Blood Guilty Pleas — DOJ
